assertions.title: Stock Daily Data Covers 5-Year Date Range

steps.action: Query stocks with min(trade_time) > 2021-06-01 cross-referenced with stock_basic.list_date < 20210101
steps.expected: 0 pre-2021 stocks with data starting after 2021-06-01
steps.observed: 55 pre-2021 stocks have data starting after 2021-06-01. Many are recently expanded universe stocks (e.g., 603993 洛阳钼业 listed 20121009, min_date 2025-08-06; 603799 华友钴业 listed 20150129, min_date 2025-08-06). These stocks were added to klines but not backfilled to 2021.

steps.action: Verify total distinct stock count in klines

assertions.issues: 55 pre-2021 stocks in the expanded universe were added to klines but not backfilled to 2021. Most have only 147-152 rows starting from Aug 2025, indicating they were only recently added via daily updates without historical backfill.

assertions.title: Sufficient Row Count Per Stock

steps.action: Query pre-2021 stocks (list_date < 20210101) with fewer than 1000 daily kline rows
steps.observed: 54 pre-2021 stocks have fewer than 1000 rows. Lowest counts: 002296 (147 rows), 300382 (147 rows), 688028 (147 rows) — all listed well before 2021.

assertions.issues: 54 pre-2021 stocks lack sufficient historical data. These are expanded universe stocks that were added but not backfilled — they have only 147-152 rows from daily updates since ~Aug 2025.

assertions.title: No Significant Gaps in Stock Daily Data

steps.action: Sample 50 pre-2021 stocks with >= 1000 rows, cross-reference kline dates against trade_calendar, count missing trading days per stock
steps.expected: Each sampled stock has <= 30 missing trading days (AGENTS.md threshold for A-share suspensions)
steps.observed: Maximum missing days observed: 23 (stock 000425). All 50 sampled stocks are within the 30-day tolerance. Only 14 of 50 stocks had any missing days at all.

evidence.queryResults: Worst gaps: 000425 (23 missing), 300757 (20), 600859 (17), 601866 (11). All within 30-day tolerance.
evidence.note: Sampled only stocks with >= 1000 rows (i.e., properly backfilled stocks). Missing days are consistent with A-share stock suspension patterns.

steps.action: Query COUNT(DISTINCT symbol_code) FROM klines WHERE symbol_type='STOCK' AND timeframe='DAY'
steps.observed: 1656 distinct stocks — well above the 800 threshold

evidence.queryResults: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol_code) FROM klines WHERE symbol_type='STOCK' AND timeframe='DAY' → 1656
evidence.additionalContext: Watchlist has 1938 entries; 287 watchlist stocks have zero kline data. 1656 stocks have at least some daily kline data.

assertions.title: Post-2021 IPO Stocks Backfilled from List Date

steps.action: Cross-reference MIN(trade_time) with stock_basic.list_date for post-2021 IPO stocks, checking if min_kline is within 5 trading days (~7 calendar days) of list_date
steps.expected: All post-2021 stocks have min_kline within 7 calendar days of list_date
steps.observed: 201 post-2021 stocks in klines. 34 of 201 (17%) have min_kline > 7 calendar days from list_date. Worst cases: 688626 翔宇医疗 (listed 20210331, min_kline 2025-08-12, 1595 days off), 605117 德业股份 (listed 20210420, min_kline 2025-08-06, 1569 days off).
Most post-2021 stocks (167 of 201) have 0 day_diff — correctly backfilled from list_date.

evidence.keyExamples: 688626 翔宇医疗 (listed 20210331, min_kline 2025-08-12, diff=1595 days), 605117 德业股份 (listed 20210420, min_kline 2025-08-06, diff=1569 days), 300988 津荣天宇 (listed 20210512, min_kline 2025-08-13, diff=1554 days)

assertions.issues: 34 post-2021 IPO stocks have data starting from 2025 rather than their list_date. These are expanded universe stocks that were added but not properly backfilled from their IPO date.

assertions.title: Expanded Stock Universe Fully Backfilled

steps.action: Query watchlist stocks (pre-2021 listing) that have no kline data before 2021-06-01, using correct join on stock_basic.symbol
steps.expected: <= 10 pre-2021 watchlist stocks missing early data
steps.observed: 214 pre-2021 watchlist stocks have no kline data before 2021-06-01. Total: 1614 pre-2021 stocks in watchlist, 214 (13.3%) missing early data.

Missing stocks include long-established companies: 603885 吉祥航空 (listed 20150527, min_kline 2025-08-12, 148 rows), 603993 洛阳钼业 (listed 20121009, min_kline 2025-08-06, 152 rows). These were added to the expanded universe but not backfilled.

evidence.queryResults: 214 pre-2021 watchlist stocks missing early data (see VAL-CROSS-002-pre2021-missing-early-data.txt)
evidence.contextNumbers: Total watchlist: 1938, Pre-2021 in watchlist: 1614, Missing early data: 214 (13.3%), Stocks with zero kline data: 287 of 1938 watchlist entries

assertions.issues: 214 pre-2021 watchlist stocks (13.3% of pre-2021 watchlist) are missing early data. Most have only 147-152 rows from recent daily updates (Aug 2025+) without historical backfill. The fail threshold is >10.

frictions.description: klines.symbol_code uses short format (e.g., '301007') while stock_basic.ts_code uses exchange-suffixed format (e.g., '301007.SZ'). Required joining on stock_basic.symbol instead of stock_basic.ts_code for cross-reference queries.
frictions.resolution: Used JOIN stock_basic sb ON k.symbol_code = sb.symbol instead of sb.ts_code

frictions.description: The validation contract's original query for VAL-CROSS-002 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM watchlist w WHERE NOT EXISTS ...) does not cross-reference list_date, making it impossible to distinguish post-2021 IPOs from genuinely missing data. Had to add JOIN to stock_basic to filter by list_date.
frictions.resolution: Added JOIN stock_basic sb ON w.ticker = sb.symbol WHERE sb.list_date < '20210101' to the query

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-BACKFILL-003, VAL-BACKFILL-012), 4 failed (VAL-BACKFILL-001, VAL-BACKFILL-002, VAL-BACKFILL-021, VAL-CROSS-002). The core issue: ~214 pre-2021 stocks from the expanded universe were added to klines via recent daily updates but NOT historically backfilled to 2021. These stocks have only 147-152 rows starting from Aug 2025. Additionally, 34 post-2021 IPO stocks have data starting from 2025 instead of their list_date. The 1400+ stocks that were already in the watchlist before expansion are properly backfilled with good coverage.
